text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Flower. For your present, I
attempted to bake those desserts you like.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not know why, but the moment I initiated
contact with the oven, it ceased to function
entirely. The mission ended in failure. My
sincerest apologies...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, it's not your fault. Don't be too hard on
yourself, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A backup plan must be drafted at the current
juncture. I will accept any input, as long as it is
from you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: My... input? Hmm... Um... Then how about...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
How about you join me in roasting some
marshmallows to eat? We can use a grill instead
of an oven, so you shouldn't run into any issues,
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Orders received. However... Is today not your
birthday, Flower? Can I really partake in the
consumption of marshmallows?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
O-of course you can! And actually, um, I... like
watching you eat.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You know how you blow on hot foods before you
eat them? I think it's really cute. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Reassurance acknowledged—adding that cooling
operations are considered cute to database.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Database updated... Heat detected in cheeks. Blow...
